plugins.name: n8n-workflow-builder
plugins.description: Conversational n8n workflow builder with Agent Mode. Build workflows from plain English (/n8n), use Claude as an AI agent brain with n8n tool workflows at zero LLM API cost (/n8n-agent), manage workflows (/n8n-manage), and explore 1,396 nodes (/n8n-browse). Ships with a 75MB SQLite database for instant node discovery.
